blocks.text: Match preview: United States of America face Netherlands in 114th Match (ODI) on Sun, 14 Jun, 2026, 8:30 pm at Maple Leaf North-West Ground King City. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.

rows: United States of America vs Netherlands
ICC Cricket World Cup League Two 2023-27
Maple Leaf North-West Ground King City

blocks.text: Standard ODI surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 250–290 runs par score.
Foggy · High 37°C / Low 13°C · Rain: 0 mm · Wind: up to 24 km/h. Cloud cover expected — seamers may get movement with the new ball.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
